reviews.comment:
50 años de ir y venir a Cordoba,aunque haya servicio en autopista es mi parada Km 429.Atencion y cordialidad  de amigos.

(Translated by Google)
50 years of coming and going to Cordoba, although there is service on the highway, this is my stop at km 429. Friendly service and warmth.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBLU15a2xnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Todo el personal de la estación de servicio es muy amable. ¡eso si! Ir con paciencia porque (aunque habitualmente no es muy concurrida) no tienen apuro en atender y se toman su tiempo con cada cliente.
Posee espacio verde arbolado con mesas y bancos muy bien cuidados y cafetería.

(Translated by Google)
All the staff at the gas station are very friendly. Just be prepared to wait because (although it's usually not very busy) they're in no hurry and take their time with each customer. It has a well-maintained, wooded green space with tables and benches, and a café.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRNThEOFlBEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención. Para llegar es necesario salirse de la autopista Rosario Córdoba. Como siempre, el ACA, una maravilla de servicio.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. To get there you need to exit off the Rosario-Córdoba highway. As always, the ACA provides wonderful service.

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención, exquisitos sandwiches caseros. Zona de arboles con mesas para estar un rato. El ACA ya debiera decidir reformar y modernizar el edificio.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, delicious homemade sandwiches. A shady area with tables to relax in. The ACA should really decide to renovate and modernize the building.
